message:
perf(indexer): Eliminate mutex lock contention in agent discovery (Opt 2.2)

Remove mutex lock acquisitions from inside the parallel connector scan.
Previously, discovered_agent_names mutex was locked O(connectors) times
during par_iter. Now names are collected after the parallel phase with
a single mutex lock, eliminating contention on many-core systems.

Changes:
- Return discovery state in pending_batches tuple (name, convs, discovered)
- Move discovered_agent_names population to post-parallel phase
- Keep AtomicUsize for discovered_agents count (no contention, fast UI feedback)
- Add logging for discovery state per connector

Expected improvement: 5-10% faster scanning on 8+ core systems.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
